title: FLASH Speedmop Wet Cloth Refills 12
description: Product Description Flash SpeedMop Refills 12pk Ingredients Preservatives, Methylchloroisothiazolinone/ Methylisothiazolinone, Perfum Safety Warning Keep away from children.
